productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Royal blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, vented hem and graphic print running from the left shoulder to across the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Carry the key to your successful life everywhere you go with this royal blue t-shirt from united colors of benetton. Team this tee with jeans and sports shoes for that uber cool look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
